articles.title: Senate Exposes Years-Long Cover-up of COVID Vaccine-Cancer Links
articles.summary: Multiple oncologists testified to the U.S. Senate that stable cancer patients experienced aggressive relapses after COVID booster shots, with researchers facing reputational attacks for reporting the data. The evidence linking mRNA vaccines to increased cancer risk was systematically suppressed for years.

articles.title: Senate Hearing to Investigate COVID Vaccine Cancer Mechanisms
articles.summary: A scheduled U.S. Senate hearing will examine the biological mechanisms by which COVID-19 vaccines may increase cancer risks. This represents a rare official acknowledgment of previously suppressed safety concerns.

articles.title: Prestigious Journal Buried Pfizer's Flu Vaccine Failure in Seniors
articles.summary: A major medical journal is under fire for deliberately omitting Pfizer's failed flu vaccine data in elderly populations. This represents classic pharma-journal collusion to hide negative trial results from public scrutiny.

articles.title: FDA Medical Authoritarians Target Health Freedom Movement
articles.summary: Constitutional attorney and health freedom advocates expose how the U.S. government and FDA have systematically attacked decentralized healthcare approaches. The medical establishment continues its war against patient autonomy and alternative treatments.

articles.title: COVID Policy Damage Finally Documented After Years of Denial
articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals the shocking collateral damage caused by COVID-19 policies that health authorities refused to acknowledge. The data exposes how lockdowns and mandates caused more harm than the virus itself.

articles.title: Whistleblower Exposes Ohio Medicaid Fraud as 'National Embarrassment'
articles.summary: Mehek Cooke testified to Congress that Ohio lacked the political will to confront massive Medicaid fraud. Her testimony reveals how state officials turned a blind eye to systematic healthcare billing corruption.

articles.title: Breakthrough Longevity Compound Shows Muscle Gains and Cancer Survival
articles.summary: Independent longevity research on PTC-2105 geropeptide shows significant increases in muscle mass and cancer-specific survival rates. This metabolic approach bypasses traditional pharmaceutical channels entirely.

articles.summary: A humanities journal caved to lawsuit threats and retracted research criticizing the controversial parental alienation theory. The May 19 retraction of the IJRAH article exposes how litigation warfare silences legitimate scientific criticism.

articles.summary: A leading medical journal deliberately omitted Pfizer's negative flu vaccine efficacy data in elderly populations. The selective data presentation masks the pharmaceutical giant's failures while misleading clinicians and patients about vaccine effectiveness.
